name: Sharp Cheddar Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat cream cheese in a 20-quart mixer bowl on medium speed until smooth and creamy, about 5 minutes, scraping the bottom and side of the bowl occasionally.
2. Add Cheese Sauce. Continue beating until well blended, additional 5 minutes. Chill.
3. Serve with crackers. This may be served as a dip if desired. Serve with fresh vegetables, potato chips or crackers. May be kept in refrigerator for 3-4 days.
Makes 12 one cup portions (one portion serves 3-4)
